```{r Figure S3a function}
library(readr)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(matrixStats)
library(data.table)

# function to process a file and return a tidy dataframe for plotting
process_file <- function(filepath, direction_label, summary_path) {
  df <- as_tibble(fread(here(filepath)))
  summary_df <- read_tsv(here(summary_path))
  
  # define microarray and RNAseq individual signature columns
  microarray_cols <- colnames(df)[colnames(df) %in% summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME[summary_df$technology == "microarray" & 
                                                                                summary_df$signature_ID != "aggregated_microarray"]]
  microarray_blood_cols <- colnames(df)[colnames(df) %in% summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME[summary_df$technology == "microarray" & 
                                                                                summary_df$signature_ID != "aggregated_microarray" &
                                                                                summary_df$tissue_category == "circulating"]]
  rnaseq_cols <- colnames(df)[colnames(df) %in% summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME[summary_df$technology == "RNAseq" & 
                                                                                summary_df$signature_ID != "aggregated_RNAseq"]]
  rnaseq_blood_cols <- colnames(df)[colnames(df) %in% summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME[summary_df$technology == "RNAseq" & 
                                                                                summary_df$signature_ID != "aggregated_RNAseq" &
                                                                                summary_df$tissue_category == "circulating"]]

  # compute median of individual signatures for each Technology
  median_micro <- rowMedians(as.matrix(df[, microarray_cols]), na.rm = TRUE)
  median_micro_blood <- rowMedians(as.matrix(df[, microarray_blood_cols]), na.rm = TRUE)
  median_rna <- rowMedians(as.matrix(df[, rnaseq_cols]), na.rm = TRUE)
  median_rna_blood <- rowMedians(as.matrix(df[, rnaseq_blood_cols]), na.rm = TRUE)
  

  # compute squared deviation from the median
  sq_dev_micro <- (df$aggregated_microarray - median_micro)^2 / length(microarray_cols)
  sq_dev_micro_blood <- (df$circulating_aggregated_microarray - median_micro_blood)^2 / length(microarray_blood_cols)
  sq_dev_rna <- (df$aggregated_RNAseq - median_rna)^2 / length(rnaseq_cols)
  sq_dev_rna_blood <- (df$circulating_aggregated_RNAseq - median_rna_blood)^2 / length(rnaseq_blood_cols)
  
  # combine into tidy data frame with direction label
  tibble(
    Pathway = df$Description,
    Microarray_all = sq_dev_micro,
    Microarray_circulating = sq_dev_micro_blood,
    RNAseq_all = sq_dev_rna,
    RNAseq_circulating = sq_dev_rna_blood,
    Direction = direction_label
  ) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(Microarray_all, Microarray_circulating, RNAseq_all, RNAseq_circulating), names_to = "Technology", values_to = "SquaredDeviation")
}
```

```{r Figure S3a plot}
# process both up- and dn-regulated pathways files
plot_df_up <- process_file(filepath = "figures/figureS5/marray_rnaseq_up_pathways_suppl.tsv", 
                           direction_label = "Upregulated", 
                           summary_path = "figures/figure2/metadata_annotation/annotation_table.tsv")
plot_df_dn <- process_file(filepath = "figures/figureS5/marray_rnaseq_dn_pathways_suppl.tsv", 
                           direction_label = "Downregulated",
                           summary_path = "figures/figure2/metadata_annotation/annotation_table.tsv")

# combine both into one dataframe
combined_plot_df <- bind_rows(plot_df_up, plot_df_dn) %>%
  mutate(Direction = factor(Direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated")))

combined_plot_df <- combined_plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    SquaredDeviation_fixed = ifelse(SquaredDeviation == 0, NA, SquaredDeviation), # replace 0 with NA to avoid -inf as median
    log10_SquaredDeviation = log10(SquaredDeviation_fixed) # manipulated to see log10 effect
  )

# compute medians for label annotations
med_labels <- combined_plot_df %>%
  group_by(Direction, Technology) %>%
  summarise(log10_SquaredDeviation = median(log10_SquaredDeviation, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```

```{r try facet | help from GPT for facet set up 10/22/25}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Split the data by Direction
up_df <- subset(combined_plot_df, Direction == "Upregulated")
down_df <- subset(combined_plot_df, Direction == "Downregulated")

# Split the median labels too
up_labels <- subset(med_labels, Direction == "Upregulated")
down_labels <- subset(med_labels, Direction == "Downregulated")

pdf(here("figures/figureS6/FigureS6_origin_squared_deviation.pdf"),
    width = 15, height = 10)
# Plot for Upregulated
p_up <- ggplot(up_df, aes(x = Technology, y = SquaredDeviation_fixed, fill = Technology)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::label_scientific(digits = 2)) +
  geom_text(
    data = up_labels,
    aes(
      x = Technology,
      y = 10^(log10_SquaredDeviation),
      label = sprintf("%.2e", 10^(log10_SquaredDeviation))
    ),
    hjust = -0.2,
    vjust = -1,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Upregulated",
    y = "Squared Deviation",
    x = "Technology/Tissue origin"
  ) +
  #scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D") +  # for discrete color
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 18),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18)
  )

# Plot for Downregulated
p_down <- ggplot(down_df, aes(x = Technology, y = SquaredDeviation_fixed, fill = Technology)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::label_scientific(digits = 2)) +
  geom_text(
    data = down_labels,
    aes(
      x = Technology,
      y = 10^(log10_SquaredDeviation),
      label = sprintf("%.2e", 10^(log10_SquaredDeviation))
    ),
    hjust = -0.2,
    vjust = -1,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Downregulated",
    y = NULL,
    x = "Technology/Tissue origin"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 18),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),  # remove y-axis title for cleaner alignment
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18)
  )

# Combine with patchwork — show a visual separation
final_plot <- (p_up | p_down) + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Squared deviation of pathway enrichment in \n aggregated signatures by tissue of origin (log scale)",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 25, hjust = 0.5)  # match your existing styling
    )
  )

# Print
final_plot
dev.off()

```
